summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Bookvia Activity Log Phase 3. All backend API tests passed (10/10). All frontend UI tests passed. The activity log endpoint, filtering, pagination, access control, and UI components are working correctly.

issues: Minor: Console warning about span inside option element in select dropdown - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/businesses/my/activity-log returns logs with total, page, pages - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/businesses/my/activity-log?actor_type=admin filters only admin actions - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/businesses/my/activity-log?actor_type=owner filters only owner actions - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/businesses/my/activity-log with admin token returns 403 - PASSED
Backend: Activity log entry structure has all required fields (id, business_id, actor_type, actor_name, action, target_type, target_id, details, created_at) - PASSED
Backend: Activity log pagination works correctly - PASSED
Backend: Unauthenticated access to activity log denied - PASSED
Backend: Activity logs exist for business (6 sample logs seeded) - PASSED
Backend: All logged actions are valid action types - PASSED
Backend: Logs sorted by created_at DESC - PASSED
Frontend Dashboard (owner): 'Actividad' tab visible in tabs - PASSED
Frontend Dashboard (owner): Click on 'Actividad' loads activity log with 6 entries - PASSED
Frontend Dashboard (owner): Each entry shows colored icon, action in Spanish, actor badge, and details - PASSED
Frontend Dashboard (owner): Filter dropdown (Todos/Dueño/Administradores) works - PASSED
Frontend Dashboard (owner): Refresh button reloads data - PASSED
Frontend Dashboard (admin): 'Actividad' tab NOT visible (only for owners) - PASSED
Frontend Dashboard (admin): Manager session banner visible - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: Activity log endpoint correctly restricts access to owner only (is_manager check)
create_business_activity helper properly logs actor_type (owner/admin) and actor_name
Activity logging integrated into complete_booking, cancel_booking_by_business, reschedule_booking_by_business, designate_manager, remove_manager, update_manager_permissions
Frontend correctly hides Activity tab for managers using !isManager condition
Activity log UI displays colored icons per action type with proper Spanish labels
Filter and pagination work correctly with API integration
seed_data_creation: 6 sample activity logs pre-seeded in database for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Activity Log Phase 3 is fully implemented and tested. Key features: (1) GET /api/businesses/my/activity-log endpoint with filtering (actor_type, action) and pagination, (2) Access restricted to owner only (403 for managers), (3) Automatic logging on booking actions (complete, cancel, reschedule) and admin management (designate, remove, update permissions), (4) Frontend 'Actividad' tab visible only for owners with filter dropdown, refresh button, and paginated log entries with colored icons per action type.
